---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

# Introduction

## About the data

text

# Setup

```{r load packages}
library(readr)
library(here)
```


```{r}
#| echo: false
bg_chem <- read_csv(here('data','BGchem2008data.csv'))
```


```{r}
#| eval: false
#| echo: false
colnames(bg_chem)
str(bg_chem)
head(bg_chem)
summary(bg_chem)
```

```{r}
plot(bg_chem$P, bg_chem$NO2 + bg_chem$NO3 + bg_chem$NH4)
```
